title: Add compliance ownership talk track for Series A expansion deals
rationale: The Gong-style transcript and G2-style review both show buyers asking who owns nuanced country-specific employment questions after onboarding.
proposed_markdown: - For Series A teams hiring first employees in Canada or the UK, explicitly ask who will own nuanced country-specific compliance questions after go-live. Position Oyster as the guided partner for first-market expansion, not just a tool for onboarding paperwork.
